title: A little bit about me 🤔️
copy: I've been a full stack developer for 5 years now. My first speciality was WordPress, building websites from scratch using a fully customized theme and building custom plugins. No pre-built themes. From there, I switched focus to React, and have been using tools like Gatsby, Contentful, and Node. When I'm not learning a new tech stack, you can find me lifting weights, running, or playing sports.
